steps.title: Use the stated correspondence
steps.content: In the congruence statement, $A$ corresponds to $P$. Corresponding angles in congruent triangles are equal, so $\angle P = \angle A$.

steps.title: Find angle P
steps.content: The measure of $\angle A$ is $50^\circ$, so the measure of $\angle P$ is also $50^\circ$. That confirms B is correct.
